subcodes.first_line: Although epistles have been dispatched in the Arabic and Persian tongues and in every manner, yet once again We declare [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگرچه بلسان عربی و عجمی و بهمه قسم مراسلات ارسال شد ولکن مع ذلک مجددا اظهار
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @exhortations and counsels, @consolation and comfort, @nearness and remoteness
